metadata.name: New Module
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: A creeping corruption poisons the rivers and fields. Find the purification stones in the dungeons and cleanse the sacred fountain in Ashbrook.

moongate.name: Moongate
moongate.description: A shimmering ring of blue light hovers above the ground. The air crackles with energy. Where it leads, none can say.

whispering_stones.name: Whispering Stones
whispering_stones.description: Three tall standing stones arranged in a triangle. When the wind blows through them, you can almost hear words.

towns.name: Ashbrook
towns.description: A forest clearing settlement where druids and woodsmen live side by side.

key_dungeons.name: Flooded Labyrinth
key_dungeons.description: The entrance to Flooded Labyrinth gapes like a wound in the hillside. A cold draught carries the scent of damp stone.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Search Flooded Labyrinth for the hidden Ivory Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Rumors say it was sealed away behind deadly traps.

key_dungeons.name: Burning Labyrinth
key_dungeons.description: A rusted iron gate bars the path into Burning Labyrinth. It swings open with a tortured groan at your touch.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Venture into Burning Labyrinth and liberate the Opal Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The artifact pulses with ancient energy.
